title: abutilon flanaganii
intro: Abutilon flanaganii, also known as the Flanagan's Abutilon, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Abutilon flanaganii include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
